name: Virgin Pulse (Personify Health) Wellbeing API
what_it_does: Virgin Pulse (now Personify Health) Employee Wellbeing REST API for comprehensive employer-sponsored wellbeing, benefits navigation, and health engagement. Enables AI agents to manage wellbeing program enrollment and journey personalization for population health automation, handle device and wearable integration for health data aggregation, access benefits navigation and advocacy for health system navigation automation, retrieve population health risk stratification for care management referral, manage incentive program and rewards management for wellbeing motivation, handle clinical program integration (chronic condition management, EAP) for care coordination, access mental health and resilience program for employee behavioral health, retrieve whole-person wellbeing analytics for HR population health reporting, manage social wellbeing and team challenges for employee engagement, and integrate with HRIS, benefits administration, and health plan platforms.
use_cases: Personalizing wellbeing journeys from population health agents
Aggregating wearable health data from fitness integration agents
Navigating benefits from employee health advocate agents
Stratifying health risk from care management agents
not_for: Clinical disease management without employer wellness context
Small businesses without enterprise wellbeing program scale
Consumer wellness without employer benefit integration
best_when: A large employer or health plan using Virgin Pulse/Personify Health wants AI agents to automate wellbeing program delivery, benefits navigation, population health stratification, and employee health engagement.
avoid_when: ADA/GINA WELLNESS PROGRAM COMPLIANCE: Automated wellbeing programs using health risk assessments and biometric data must comply with ADA voluntary participation requirements and GINA genetic information prohibitions; automated HRA and biometric incentive programs require EEOC wellness program rule compliance. PHI in health plan integration — when Personify Health integrates with health plan data for risk stratification, PHI is involved requiring HIPAA compliance and BAA; automated population health risk scoring using PHI requires minimum necessary standard adherence. Wearable data privacy — automated wearable and device data collection raises state biometric data privacy concerns (Illinois BIPA, Texas, Washington); automated employee biometric data collection requires explicit informed consent in applicable states.

auth.notes: Virgin Pulse/Personify Health uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes. REST API with JSON. Providence, Rhode Island HQ. Founded 2004. Virgin Pulse and HealthComp merged in 2023 to form Personify Health (previously Virgin Pulse). Private (Francisco Partners). 14M+ members. Competes with Limeade, Rally Health (Optum), and Castlight Health for employee wellbeing.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-employee annual subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; per-employee pricing with module options
pricing.notes: Providence, Rhode Island. Francisco Partners-backed. 14M+ members. Virgin Pulse + HealthComp = Personify Health 2023. Competes with Limeade and Rally Health.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; enterprise SLA

known_agent_gotchas: BIPA BIOMETRIC DATA PRIVACY: Automated wearable and biometric data collection from employees in Illinois, Texas, or Washington requires explicit informed written consent under state biometric privacy laws (BIPA, TBIA, WBTA); automated biometric collection without consent creates class action liability

ADA voluntary wellness program compliance — automated wellbeing program enrollment that creates employment consequences for non-participation violates ADA voluntary wellness program requirement; participation must be genuinely optional without job-related penalties

GINA family medical history prohibition — automated health risk assessments must not ask about or collect employee family medical history; GINA prohibits employer collection of genetic information through wellness programs

Merger API integration risk — Virgin Pulse and HealthComp merged to form Personify Health (2023); API stability and product consolidation post-merger should be evaluated before long-term integration investment

PHI minimum necessary for risk stratification — automated population health risk scoring using health plan PHI requires HIPAA minimum necessary standard; automated risk models using all available PHI without purpose limitation create HIPAA compliance concern

Incentive tax treatment — automated wellbeing incentive payments (gift cards, cash equivalents) may be taxable employee income; automated incentive distribution must coordinate with payroll for W-2 reporting
agent_readiness.security_notes: Employee wellbeing. SOC2, HIPAA. OAuth2 with scopes. US/EU. Employee health and wellbeing data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Employee wellbeing. SOC2, HIPAA. OAuth2 with scopes. US/EU. Employee health and biometric data.
